calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-02-2004 Off Calendar

MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Mar-30-2004 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: David S. Zalob, Esq. for Plaintiff
Angelos Kolobotos, Property Manager for Plaintiff, Fillmore 359
Eric Hogan, Defendant in propria persona

Settlement Conference held. Case settled on the record.
Term of the settlement were read into the record as follows.
Defendant vacates 359 Fillmore St. # 15 , S.F., CA by 7/15/04 at 12pm
Defendant pays Plaintiff $260 per month beginning on 7/15/05 for 12 months on the 15th of each month.
The security deposit of $975 is retained by the landlord.
If the Defendant vacates the premises on 7/15/04 and makes all the payments, Plaintiff will waive all back rent and damages and file a dismissal of this action with prejudice.
If defendant fails to vacate and pay the agreed amount, Judgment will be issued by ex parte application for restitution and possession of the premises, back rent and damages.
Lease will be forfeited.
Plaintiff will not file a written agreement unless defendant defaults.
Jury trial vacated.
JPT: Carolyn Gold Clerk: Marjorie Schwartz-Scott, CSR: Carol Karen
